recommendations.title: PG: Psycho Goreman
recommendations.overview: Siblings Mimi and Luke unwittingly resurrect an ancient alien overlord. Using a magical amulet, they force the monster to obey their childish whims, and accidentally attract a rogues’ gallery of intergalactic assassins to small-town suburbia.

recommendations.title: Leprechaun Returns
recommendations.overview: A group of unwitting sorority sisters accidentally awaken the serial-killing Leprechaun after they build a sorority house on his hunting grounds.

recommendations.title: V/H/S/94
recommendations.overview: After the discovery of a mysterious VHS tape, a brutish police SWAT team launches a high-intensity raid on a remote warehouse, only to discover a sinister cult compound whose collection of pre-recorded material uncovers a nightmarish conspiracy.
recommendations.director: Simon Barrett, Steven Kostanski, Chloe Okuno, Timo Tjahjanto, Jennifer Reeder, Ryan Prows

recommendations.title: Cold Prey II
recommendations.overview: After surviving the events in the Jotunheimen mountains in which four of her friends were murdered, the badly injured Jannicke is brought to the local hospital. But when she wakes up, the building is dark and deserted... and she soon realizes that he

recommendations.title: Wind Chill
recommendations.overview: Two college students share a ride home for the holidays. When they break down on a deserted stretch of road, they're preyed upon by the ghosts of people who have died there.

recommendations.title: Monolith
recommendations.overview: A desperate young journalist turns to podcasting to salvage her career, but her rush to make headlines leads her to an alien conspiracy.

recommendations.title: The Medusa Touch
recommendations.overview: A French detective in London reconstructs the life of a man lying in hospital with severe injuries with the help of journals and a psychiatrist. He realises that the man had powerful telekinetic abilities.

recommendations.title: Lifechanger
recommendations.overview: A murderous shapeshifter sets out on a blood-soaked mission to make things right with the woman he loves.

recommendations.title: Get Real
recommendations.overview: Sensitive rural town model student Steven Carter hides his gay feelings, except with his neighbor and best friend Linda. Suddenly his desperate search for partners leads to a blind date with golden boy John Dixon, bound for an Oxbridge career.

recommendations.title: Inbred
recommendations.overview: Four young offenders and their workers spend a weekend in the remote Yorkshire village of Mortlake, which prides on keeping itself to itself. A minor incident with locals rapidly escalates into a blood-soaked, deliriously warped nightmare.
